title: SOUTHERN ROMANIAN CARPATHIAN MOUNTAINS
subtitle: Certified ecotourism
description: A policy brief examining certified ecotourism as a sustainable tourism model in the Southern Romanian Carpathians to support local community resilience and environmental conservation. It highlights socio-economic challenges such as depopulation, traditional practice abandonment, and unregulated development, and offers recommendations to strengthen ecotourism and agri-food value chains through integrated mountain governance.
